summary.notes: hooks/pretool-bash-safety.sh is a bash shell hook script, not a markdown command/agent documentation file. Prompt verbosity detection rules (## Philosophy, ## Overview, ## Quality Standards, ## Safety Features, ## Helper Scripts, ## Usage) apply only to *.md command and agent documentation files. This file contains no markdown section headers — it is executable shell code with inline comments. The diff introduces two changes: (1) grep regex fix replacing 'dd |mkfs|fdisk|shred ' with 'dd|mkfs|fdisk|shred\b' at line 1109, (2) Chinese-language error message replaced with English at line 1277. Neither change introduces prompt verbosity violations.
